at.description: At is the UTC timestamp when the match was confirmed.

confidence.description: Confidence is the NCC score that triggered the match (0.0–1.0).

change_threshold.description: pixel-delta fraction required to leave MATCH state

consecutive_hits.description: consecutive matching frames required before counting

max_poll_ms.description: slowest adaptive poll interval (static screen), default 500

min_poll_ms.description: fastest adaptive poll interval (high activity), default 30

poll_interval_ms.description: base milliseconds between capture polls (adaptive centre point)

defaultConsecutiveHits.description: DefaultConsecutiveHits is the recommended number of matching frames before counting.

defaultCooldownSec.description: DefaultCooldownSec is the recommended minimum seconds between counted encounters.

key.description: Key is the canonical identifier stored in Pokemon.HuntType.

nameDE.description: NameDE is the German display name.

nameEN.description: NameEN is the English display name.

oddsNumer.description: OddsNumer and OddsDenom express the base shiny probability as a fraction.

templateTip.description: TemplateTip is an English hint shown to the user when capturing a template.

info.description: Pokémon Shiny Encounter Counter — REST API
info.title: Encounty API

get.summary: Get or set detector config for a Pokemon

post.summary: Get or set detector config for a Pokemon

delete.description: Removes all detection log entries for the given Pokemon.
delete.summary: Clear detection log for a Pokemon

post.summary: Submit a WebGPU match score for a Pokemon

delete.summary: Get, delete or update a detector template

get.summary: Get, delete or update a detector template

patch.summary: Get, delete or update a detector template

delete.description: Removes all templates and their images for the given Pokemon.
delete.summary: Clear all templates for a Pokemon

get.description: Returns the games list sorted by generation

post.description: Triggers a background sync of game metadata from PokeAPI
Replaces the full hotkey map and re-registers all bindings
Suspends global hotkey dispatch without unregistering bindings
Re-enables hotkey dispatch after a pause

get.description: Reports whether the hotkey backend is available

put.description: Updates one action's key binding without touching the others

get.description: Returns all available hunt type presets

post.description: Records that the user has accepted the AGPLv3 license

get.description: Returns all collected third-party license entries
Returns the active Pokemon and its ID for the OBS overlay page
Returns the current Accessibility and Screen Recording permission state

post.description: Opens the system dialog or settings pane for the specified permission
Creates a new Pokemon entry with a generated UUID and timestamp

delete.description: Removes the Pokemon, stops its detector, and deletes template files

put.description: Applies the JSON body fields to the Pokemon with the given ID

post.description: Sets the given Pokemon as the active one for hotkey actions
Marks the hunt as finished by stamping CompletedAt
Subtracts one encounter from the Pokemon (floor 0)
Adds one encounter to the Pokemon and broadcasts the update
Copies the resolved overlay into the Pokemon and sets mode to custom
Zeroes out the encounter counter for the Pokemon
Sets the encounter count to an exact value
Clears the per-Pokemon timer entirely
Begins the per-Pokemon timer
Stops the per-Pokemon timer and accumulates elapsed time
Clears CompletedAt, returning the Pokemon to active-hunt status
Performs a graceful shutdown: saves state, stops hotkeys, and exits
Saves state, stops hotkeys, and replaces the process with a fresh instance

get.description: Returns the session history as JSON

post.description: Replaces the settings block and reconfigures file output
Moves all data to a new directory

get.description: Returns the complete AppState snapshot including all Pokemon, settings, and sessions
Returns encounter statistics for a specific Pokemon, with optional /history or /chart sub-paths
Returns build version information injected at compile time
